untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of specific candlestick pattern (Broadening Tops/Megaphone with higher highs and lower lows widening over time) and identification of pattern height/width characteristics. These require multi-bar pattern recognition and geometric analysis not available in the allowed indicator set. The 'upward breakout' direction can be approximated, but the core pattern detection (megaphone structure, progressive widening, tall vs narrow classification) cannot be expressed with standard technical indicators alone.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture upward trend and volume confirmation aspects: entry requires price above 20-day MA (uptrend confirmation) and above-average volume (U-shaped volume pattern proxy). Exit on break below MA (trend reversal). Stop loss set to 15% based on failure rate in bear market. However, the precise pattern structure and breakout mechanics require custom pattern detection logic beyond standard indicator syntax.
